alwaysAnimate.name: AlwaysAnimate
alwaysAnimate.description: Animates anything that can be animated

alwaysExpandRoles.name: AlwaysExpandRoles
alwaysExpandRoles.description: Always expands the role list in profile popouts

betterFolders.name: BetterFolders
betterFolders.description: Display servers from folder on dedicated sidebar

betterGifPicker.name: BetterGifPicker
betterGifPicker.description: Makes the gif picker open the favourite category by default

betterRoleContext.name: BetterRoleContext
betterRoleContext.description: File format to use when viewing role icons

betterSessions.name: BetterSessions
betterSessions.description: Check for new sessions in the background, and display notifications when they are detected

biggerStreamPreview.name: BiggerStreamPreview
biggerStreamPreview.description: This plugin allows you to enlarge stream previews

clearURLs.name: ClearURLs
clearURLs.description: Automatically removes tracking elements from URLs you send

copyEmojiMarkdown.name: CopyEmojiMarkdown
copyEmojiMarkdown.description: Copy the raw unicode character instead of :name: for default emojis (👽)

copyFileContents.name: CopyFileContents
copyFileContents.description: Adds a button to text file attachments to copy their contents

copyStickerLinks.name: CopyStickerLinks
copyStickerLinks.description: Adds the ability to copy & open Sticker links

crashHandler.name: CrashHandler
crashHandler.description: Whether to attempt to prevent Discord crashes.

customIdle.name: CustomIdle
customIdle.description: Minutes before Discord goes idle (0 to disable auto-idle)

decor.name: Decor
decor.description: Create and use your own custom avatar decorations, or pick your favorite from the presets.

devCompanion.dev.name: DevCompanion
devCompanion.dev.description: Whether to notify when Dev Companion has automatically connected.

expressionCloner.name: ExpressionCloner
expressionCloner.description: Allows you to clone Emotes & Stickers to your own server (right click them)

fakeNitro.name: FakeNitro
fakeNitro.description: Allows sending fake emojis (also bypasses missing permission to use custom emojis)

favEmojiFirst.name: FavoriteEmojiFirst
favEmojiFirst.description: Puts your favorite emoji first in the emoji autocomplete.

favGifSearch.name: FavoriteGifSearch
favGifSearch.description: The part of the url you want to search

fixCodeblockGap.name: FixCodeblockGap
fixCodeblockGap.description: Removes the gap between codeblocks and text below it

fixImagesQuality.name: FixImagesQuality
fixImagesQuality.description: Also load the original image in Chat. WARNING: Read the caveats above

forceOwnerCrown.name: ForceOwnerCrown
forceOwnerCrown.description: Force the owner crown next to usernames even if the server is large.

friendInvites.name: FriendInvites
friendInvites.description: Create and manage friend invite links via slash commands (/create friend invite, /view friend invites, /revoke friend invites).

friendsSince.name: FriendsSince
friendsSince.description: Shows when you became friends with someone in the user popout

gameActivityToggle.name: GameActivityToggle
gameActivityToggle.description: Use the old icon style before Discord icon redesign

imageZoom.name: ImageZoom
imageZoom.description: Whether to save zoom and lens size values

keepCurrentChannel.name: KeepCurrentChannel
keepCurrentChannel.description: Attempt to navigate to the channel you were in before switching accounts or loading Discord.

memberCount.name: MemberCount
memberCount.description: Show member count on the server tooltip

mentionAvatars.name: MentionAvatars
mentionAvatars.description: Whether the the @ symbol should be displayed on user mentions

messageLogger.name: MessageLogger
messageLogger.description: Temporarily logs deleted and edited messages.

mutualGroupDMs.name: MutualGroupDMs
mutualGroupDMs.description: Shows mutual group dms in profiles

noBlockedMessages.name: NoBlockedMessages
noBlockedMessages.description: Completely ignores incoming messages from blocked and ignored (if enabled) users

noOnboardingDelay.name: NoOnboardingDelay
noOnboardingDelay.description: Skips the slow and annoying onboarding delay

noSystemBadge.discordDesktop.name: NoSystemBadge
noSystemBadge.discordDesktop.description: Disables the taskbar and system tray unread count badge.

noTypingAnimation.name: NoTypingAnimation
noTypingAnimation.description: Disables the CPU-intensive typing dots animation

noUnblockToJump.name: NoUnblockToJump
noUnblockToJump.description: Allows you to jump to messages of blocked or ignored users and likely spammers without unblocking them

onePingPerDM.name: OnePingPerDM
onePingPerDM.description: Select the type of DM for the plugin to affect

openInApp.name: OpenInApp
openInApp.description: Open Spotify links in the Spotify app

permissionsViewer.name: PermissionsViewer
permissionsViewer.description: The sort method used for defining which role grants an user a certain permission

pinDms.name: PinDMs
pinDms.description: Which order should pinned DMs be displayed in?

plainFolderIcon.name: PlainFolderIcon
plainFolderIcon.description: Dont show the small guild icons in folders

readAllNotificationsButton.name: ReadAllNotificationsButton
readAllNotificationsButton.description: Read all server notifications with a single button click!

relationshipNotifier.name: RelationshipNotifier
relationshipNotifier.description: Notifies you when a friend, group chat, or server removes you.

revealAllSpoilers.name: RevealAllSpoilers
revealAllSpoilers.description: Reveal all spoilers in a message by Ctrl-clicking a spoiler, or in the chat with Ctrl+Shift-click

roleColorEverywhere.name: RoleColorEverywhere
roleColorEverywhere.description: Show role colors in chat mentions (including in the message box)

seeSummaries.name: Summaries
seeSummaries.description: The time in days before a summary is removed. Note that only up to 50 summaries are kept per channel

serverInfo.name: ServerInfo
serverInfo.description: Allows you to view info about a server

serverListIndicators.name: ServerListIndicators
serverListIndicators.description: Add online friend count or server count in the server list

showAllMessageButtons.name: ShowAllMessageButtons
showAllMessageButtons.description: Always show all message buttons no matter if you are holding the shift key or not.

showHiddenThings.name: ShowHiddenThings
showHiddenThings.description: Displays various hidden & moderator-only things regardless of permissions.

showTimeoutDuration.name: ShowTimeoutDuration
showTimeoutDuration.description: How to display the timeout duration

spotifyControls.name: SpotifyControls
spotifyControls.description: Adds a Spotify player above the account panel

streamerModeOnStream.name: StreamerModeOnStream
streamerModeOnStream.description: Automatically enables streamer mode when you start streaming in Discord

themeAttributes.name: ThemeAttributes
themeAttributes.description: Adds data attributes to various elements for theming purposes

userMessagesPronouns.name: UserMessagesPronouns
userMessagesPronouns.description: Adds pronouns to chat user messages

vcDoubleClick.name: VoiceChatDoubleClick
vcDoubleClick.description: Join voice chats via double click instead of single click

vencordToolbox.name: VencordToolbox
vencordToolbox.description: Show the plugins menu in the toolbox

viewIcons.name: ViewIcons
viewIcons.description: Choose the image format to use for non animated images. Animated images will always use .gif

viewRaw.name: Guild
viewRaw.description: Change the button to view the raw content/data of any message.

voiceDownload.name: VoiceDownload
voiceDownload.description: Adds a download to voice messages. (Opens a new browser tab)

voiceMessages.name: VoiceMessages
voiceMessages.description: Allows you to send voice messages like on mobile. To do so, right click the upload button and click Send Voice Message
